headline: Can Sterling Acquisitions Strengthen Modular Capabilities and Growth?
summary: STRL bets on CEC and a 300,000 sq ft modular plant to triple prefab capacity, and chase data center and chip projects.

headline: Argan Surges 92% in 6 Months: Should Investors Still Buy the Stock?
summary: AGX sees strong backlog growth and rising power demand. Can its premium valuation still support future upside?
